summary:
Claim: Fibroblasts are the predominant connective tissue cells in the periodontal ligament.  
Evidence: - Fibroblasts synthesize the majority of collagen fibers that form the extracellular matrix of the PDL. - Immunohistochemical studies show strong colocalization of Type I collagen production with fibroblasts.  
Answer: B

Answer: B. Answer choice: B
